title: chloraea septentrionalis
intro: Chloraea septentrionalis, also known as the Northern greenhood orchid, is a species of orchid native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chloraea septentrionalis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to reduce fever. Chloraea septentrionalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
